legends.name: Pele
legends.bio: Pele is widely regarded as the greatest football player of all time and a 3-time World Cup winner.

legends.name: Maradona
legends.bio: Diego Maradona, the Golden Boy, is famous for his 'Hand of God' goal and incredible dribbling.

legends.name: Maldini
legends.bio: Paolo Maldini is one of the greatest defenders in football history, spent his entire career at AC Milan.
